system_admin.routes
===================

.. py:module:: system_admin.routes

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   System administrator routes: user management, database reset, and documentation serving.

   All routes (except serve_sphinx_docs) require an authenticated session with
   role 'system_admin'. Routes are registered on the 'system_admin' blueprint
   under /system_admin.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   system_admin.routes.inject_admin_logs
   system_admin.routes.index
   system_admin.routes.view_users
   system_admin.routes.delete_user
   system_admin.routes.shutdown
   system_admin.routes.fix_fk
   system_admin.routes.serve_sphinx_docs
   system_admin.routes.edit_user
   system_admin.routes.assign_course
   system_admin.routes.unassign_course
   system_admin.routes.admin_enroll_student
   system_admin.routes.admin_drop_student
   system_admin.routes.clear_logs
